title: Harden manager provider directory/detail contract
description: Implement or harden backend provider directory and provider detail payloads for manager use, ensuring deterministic auth/role guardrails and stable list/detail fields needed by the manager app.
acceptance_criteria: Manager role can fetch provider directory and provider detail contract payloads
Provider role and invalid token keep deterministic forbidden/unauthorized envelopes
Provider API tests cover list/detail payload shape required by manager mobile
